title: UX/AX/SX of Agentic Streams
description: Future exploration area: If AI conversations are event logs (traces), we need new interfaces (UX/AX) to manipulate them. This includes forking a conversation, joining branches, annotating streams, 'time travel' (reverting to a past state and branching), and markup of streams. [UPDATE: Concepts materialized for Streams, Forking, Time Travel, and AX.]
